🎬 Nexora Media Manager Professional AI-Powered News Video Creation  📱 Short Video 🎞️ Long Video 📝 WordPress 👍 Facebook 📸 Instagram 🎥 Videos 📐 Layout Guide 🎨 Layout Designer 📰 RSS Manager ⚙️ Settings Platform Status: ✓ Facebook ✓ Instagram ✓ WordPress ▶ Create Long Video (Full Duration) Headline Open/preview the PNGs and report whether the uploaded image appears (I can convert them to base64 and print small hashes). Description Open/preview the PNGs and report whether the uploaded image appears (I can convert them to base64 and print small hashes). Language  🇬🇧 English Voice Provider  Auto (recommended) Voice Model  Auto (choose best) Upload Image/Video (optional) 1000005579.png + Add Another Media preview Stories (add one or more) + Add Story Clear Stories Each story may include an optional image/video upload (used as green screen/visual). If none provided, the system will attempt to fetch a suitable image.
